scope.target: Local v0.4.2 release finalization and publication workflow evidence
constraints: Do not move or recreate v0.4.2
Do not change published package contracts or bytes
Do not edit the public GitHub Release body without explicit authorization
non_goals: Claim public provenance is corrected before hosted verification

steps: Correct publication workflow identity and index metadata
Finalize release.yaml with immutable tag and hosted run evidence
Correct copied task evidence and record the failed and successful runs
execution.last_completed_step: Repaired local release and workflow records and passed focused structural validation.
execution.next_action: Verify the repair independently in R042005-004.

results.summary: Finalized the local v0.4.2 registry at the immutable tag target, restored authored release sources, and corrected mutable historical workflow evidence while preserving the incident and Git history.
tests_run: rendered release-body dry-run (one marker, one provenance section, correct commit)
local v0.4.2 annotated-tag peel and invalid-object checks
results.residual_risk: The public GitHub Release body still contains invalid provenance until separately authorized and replaced.
